title: Spicy Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and spicy North African dish with tender chicken cooked in a rich tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat the oil in the base of a tagine or large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned.
Add the garlic, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chili paste and stir to combine. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add 1 cup of water to the tagine and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the tagine, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
